name: Cornbread Mason-Dixon Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Dry cornbread crumbs (from your favorite NON-SWEET cornbread recipe)
recipeInstructions: Crumble the cornbread and white bread into a large bowl. Melt the butter in a frying pan over low heat, then add the onions and celery. Cook until the vegetables are soft but not browned. Pour the butter/vegetable mixture over the bread crumbs. Stir in the nuts, canned corn (and its liquid if used), and seasonings. Add enough chicken broth/turkey stock to reach your desired consistency.
